title: Telemetry Frame
description: A live telemetry snapshot pushed to the SPA: the latest sensor readings (and optionally actuator positions) for one greenhouse at the envelope `ts`. The SPA appends one point per metric to its per-series ring buffer and renders the live chart edge (frontend data model §5, architecture §4). Zone-scoped readings carry the envelope zone_id; house-level readings leave it null.

readings.description: Latest sensor samples at this instant, one entry per metric (metric→unit bound).

actuators.description: Optional actuator position samples at this instant (commanded vs observed). Feeds the detail view's actuator panel (platform dashboard §1).
